tools.name: list_engagements
tools.title: List engagements
tools.description: List Herman Stone INC's fixed-scope engagement packages (HSI-001 through HSI-007), each with duration, scope, target audience, and outcome.

tools.name: list_case_studies
tools.title: List case studies
tools.description: List anonymized case studies (sector + size only, no client names) with situation, constraint, action, and confirmed outcome metrics.

tools.name: get_case_study
tools.title: Get case study
tools.description: Get the full detail of one anonymized case study by slug (e.g. `regional-healthcare-sd-wan-migration`).

tools.name: list_perspectives
tools.title: List perspectives
tools.description: List Herman Stone INC's published technical field notes (slug, title, date, tag, excerpt, reading time). Use get_perspective to retrieve the full body.

tools.name: get_perspective
tools.title: Get perspective
tools.description: Get the full body of one perspective essay by slug, including headings, paragraphs, pull-quotes, and lists.

tools.name: firm_info
tools.title: Firm info
tools.description: Public firm facts for Herman Stone INC: legal name, entity, region, contact email/phone/address, NAICS codes, NPI, and current engagement-acceptance status.
